meaning: n.(北欧神话中的英雄)西格德
examples: Regin wished to secure the treasure for himself, and forged a sword for Sigurd to slay the worm with.
In NORSE mythology, a magic cloak granted invisibility to Sigurd, a demi-god and skilled warrior with superhuman strength.
At Princeton University, meanwhile, Sigurd Wagner has also developed organic optical devices, including an organic laser on a stretchable rubber surface.
Scientists from the Centre for Heavy Ion Research in Germany, led by Professor Sigurd Hofmann, discovered copernicium in fusion experiments in 1996.
After hours of producing PowerPoint presentations for his job as a hospice-care salesman in Malden, Massachusetts, Sigurd Persson, 54, likes to blow off some steam.
